channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Stop lines faded, 10th July
item.description:
Many stop lines have faded and require repainting.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal poles netting sponge breeze blocks on the green, 10th July
item.description:
An eyesore of rubbish.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Clarendon Green, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter across large section of pavement, 10th July
item.description:
Lots of litter across large bit of pavement Please clear asap as rats & foxes seen on rubbish thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67, Gordon Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lights out between Farmfoods and Erith Health Centre., 10th July
item.description:
No lamp post lights. Between Farmfoods and Erith Health Centre. No smaller lights strung between the lamp posts. For at least two nights.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cross Street, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant dumping of rubbish outside this block of white flats, 10th July
item.description:
Every few days there is constant household rubbish dumped outside this white block of flats Please remove asap As foxes & rats seen on rubbish Also could the council Contact the owner of block of flats to check If it’s their tenants dumping rubbish please? Everyone in Nunhead is fed up with having to report this every week Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 219-229, Gordon Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Longstanding unsightly Graffiti, 10th July
item.description:
This graffiti is on the gable end wall of Phoenix Wharf that faces into Arnold Estate. It has been here since last year. Has previously been reported to Southwark Council for removal but with no action

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 221-248, Phoenix Wharf Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: School vehicle dumped, 10th July
item.description:
This Van has been dumped here for three or four days and parked halfway in the road opposite my house sold that people have to squeeze past my vehicle and put my vehicle at risk of getting damaged. This is a tactic by Jewish community. This is hate crime.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunsmure Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vandalism of Communal, 10th July
item.description:
Magnets have been deliberately removed in act of vandalism to Communal Door on Block A 1-30

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-30, Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Double seated sofa, chairs, 10th July
item.description:
The sofa and chairs have been there for a week by the bin room, it's caused a group of young men to gather and cause a lot of noise and fire hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Horsman Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old fridge has been dumped here, 10th July
item.description:
Old fridge has been dumped here

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Springwater Close, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox In Road, 10th July
item.description:
There is a dead fox in the road. Please could it be collected
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Lane, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside mcdonalds, 10th July
item.description:
Fly tipping outside mcdonalds

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eltham High Street, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of builder's waste dumped on pavement, 10th July
item.description:
This bag of builder's waste was dumped on the pavement in the early hours of 9/7/26 near bins waiting to be emptied, presumably trying to trick the collectors into taking it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Flaxton Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin keeps being thrown, outside park., 9th July
item.description:
The bin outside the park gates, outside the café - lopeto, was thrown out by vandals tonight - kids, who have been plaguing the park for weeks. My friend saw them do it! A worker from cafe, put back in after. But it's not safe, as could be thrown in pond - injuring wildlife or hurled at people. Please, can you properly arrange, for it to be secured in the ground? Also, we need more patrols by Ward. As it's not safe in the evening, which is a joke. You have refused wardens - the only park Ranger, ceased many years ago. Money needs to be spent, Millions spent on the warehouse there, but none for security! Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2-4, High Street, Ramsden, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cardboard, 9th July
item.description:
Cardboard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stansfield Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Freezer, gas canister, plastic trays, 9th July
item.description:
Freezer, gas canister, plastic trays

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellefields Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Estate agent sign, 9th July
item.description:
Estate agent sign

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stockwell Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This part of Radnor Road has not been swept, rubbish and old debris near the curbside, 9th July
item.description:
This stretch of Radnor Road needs sweeping as old debris and litter( bottles, cigarette butt's and general waste are still there, even though the previous report was declared as fixed The rubbish is still there and It can be found along the curb, where sometimes the cars are parked and all the way towards the junction with Commercial Way. Please check the part of Radnor Road from Freeda Corbet all the way to Commercial Way, Rubbish is on the curbside ( near the houses) and all the way where the brick garden wall is leading to Commercial Way. Please provide sweeping as well as litter picking . Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Radnor Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 9th July
item.description:
Woken up by a noise. Looked outside and saw a white flat back truck dispose of the whole load into the driveway of the house next door (Number 1, Academy Place) and then sped off.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Academy Place, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A large cardboard box stuck behind a utility unit ., 9th July
item.description:
A large cardboard box left behind the utility unit on Peckham Hill Street. Please remove it. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Peckham Hill Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
